dialogue_text: Stand up and repeat ''_Tis the voice of the sluggard_,'
source_excerpt: "Stand up and repeat ''_Tis the voice of the sluggard_,'" said the Gryphon.

dialogue_text: How the creatures order one about, and make one repeat lessons!
source_excerpt: "How the creatures order one about, and make one repeat lessons!" thought Alice; "I might as well be at school at once." However, she got up, and began to repeat it, but her head was so full of the Lobster Quadrille, that she hardly knew...
